---
title: "chlorophyll_research"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-27"
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE, warning=F}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(terra)
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(rerddap)
library(plotdap)
library(broom)
library(fuzzyjoin)
library(tidync)
library(arrow)
library(sf)
library(car)
library(lme4)
library(MuMIn)
library(ggeffects)
library(ggcorrplot)
library(Metrics)
library(mgcv)
library(ranger)
library(RPostgres)
library(DBI)
#chlor_master <- read_parquet('chlor_master.parquet')
#sst_master <- read_parquet('sst_master.parquet')
#sla_master <- read_parquet('sla_master.parquet')
#master_dataset <- read_parquet('master_dataset.parquet')
master2 <- read_parquet('master2.parquet')
#mod_spatial <- readRDS('mod_spatial.rds')
#sst_prediction <- readRDS('sst_prediction.rds')
#interaction_prediction <- readRDS('interaction_prediction.rds')
#live_forecast <- read.csv('live_forecast.csv')
#daily_master_dataset <- read_parquet('daily_master_dataset.parquet')
```

# Linear Models

```{r}
mod1 <- lm(log(chlor_a) ~ sst + sla + as.factor(month(date)) + oni_lag8, data=master2)
summary(mod1)

mod2 <- lm(log(chlor_a) ~ sst + sla + longitude + latitude + as.factor(month(date)) + oni_lag8, data=master2)
summary(mod2)

mod3 <- lm(log(chlor_a) ~ sst * as.factor(month(date)) + sla * oni_lag8, data=master2)
summary(mod3)

mod4 <- lm(log(chlor_a) ~ poly(sst, 2)*as.factor(month(date)) + sla*oni_lag8, data=master2)
summary(mod4)

AIC(mod3, mod4)
BIC(mod3, mod4)


sqrt(mean(mod1$residuals^2))
sqrt(mean(mod2$residuals^2))
```

# Variance Tables

```{r}
aov <- Anova(mod4, type=2)

var_tab <- as.data.frame(aov)

tot_sum_sq <- sum(var_tab$`Sum Sq`)
var_tab <- var_tab %>%
  mutate(pcnt_of_total = (`Sum Sq`/tot_sum_sq)*100,
  exp_ss = sum(`Sum Sq`[rownames(var_tab) != "Residuals"]),
    pcnt_of_model = ifelse(
      rownames(var_tab) == "Residuals", 
      NA, 
      (`Sum Sq` / exp_ss) * 100
    )
  ) %>%
  select(`Sum Sq`, pcnt_of_total, pcnt_of_model)

var_tab
```

# Mixed Effects Model

```{r}
mod_spatial <- lmer(
  formula = log(chlor_a) ~ poly(sst, 2, raw=T) * as.factor(month(date)) + sla * oni_lag8 + (1 | pixel_id), 
  data = master2,
  control = lmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa") 
)
summary(mod_spatial)
r.squaredGLMM(mod_spatial)

Anova(mod_spatial, type = "III")


mod_spatial2 <- lmer(
  formula = log(chlor_a) ~ poly(sst_scaled, 2, raw=T) * as.factor(month(date)) + sla_scaled * oni_lag8 + sst_tpi_scaled + (1 | pixel_id),
  data = master2,
  control = lmerControl(optimizer = 'bobyqa')
)
summary(mod_spatial2)
r.squaredGLMM(mod_spatial2)

saveRDS(mod_spatial, 'mod_spatial.rds')

mod_spatial3 <- lmer(
  formula = log(chlor_a) ~ poly(sst, 2, raw=T) * as.factor(month(date)) + poly(sst_lag1, 2, raw=T) + sla_lag1 + sla * sla_lag1 * sla_lag2 * oni_lag8 + (1 | pixel_id),
  data = master2,
  control = lmerControl(optimizer = 'bobyqa')
)


mod_spatial_scaled <- lmer(
  formula = log(chlor_a) ~ poly(sst_scaled, 2, raw=T) * as.factor(month(date)) + sla_scaled * oni_lag8_scaled + (1 | pixel_id), 
  data = master2,
  control = lmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa") 
)
summary(mod_spatial_scaled)
r.squaredGLMM(mod_spatial_scaled)
saveRDS(mod_spatial_scaled, 'mod_spatial_scaled.rds')

```

# Correlation Matrix

```{r, warning=F}
cor_data <- master2 %>%
  select(chlor_a, sst, sla, oni_lag8) %>%
  mutate(log_chlor = log(chlor_a)) %>%
  select(-chlor_a) %>% 
  drop_na()
cor_matrix <- cor(cor_data, method = "pearson")

ggcorrplot(
  cor_matrix,
  method = "circle",
  type = "lower", 
  lab = TRUE, 
  lab_size = 4,
  title = "Correlation Matrix"
)
```

# Graphing Baseline

```{r}
random_effects <- ranef(mod_spatial)$pixel_id

spatial_map <- random_effects %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column(var = "pixel_id") %>%
  rename(baseline_shift = `(Intercept)`) %>%
  separate(pixel_id, into = c("latitude", "longitude"), sep = "_", convert = TRUE)

ggplot(spatial_map, aes(x = longitude, y = latitude, fill = baseline_shift)) +
  geom_tile() +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "D", name = "(Log Chlorophyll)") +
  labs(
    title = "Chlorophyll Baseline",
    x = "Longitude", 
    y = "Latitude"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  coord_quickmap()

```

# Visualize Relationships

```{r}
sst_prediction <- ggpredict(mod_spatial, terms = "sst [all]")
interaction_prediction <- ggpredict(mod_spatial, terms = c("sla [all]", "oni_lag8 [-1.5, 0, 1.5]"))


plot(sst_prediction) +
  labs(
    title = "Optimal Temp",
    x = "Sea Surface Temperature (°C)",
    y = "Predicted log(Chlorophyll)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()


plot(interaction_prediction) +
  labs(
    title = "ONI Effect",
    x = "Sea Level Anomaly (Meters)",
    y = "Predicted log(Chlorophyll)",
    color = "ONI"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()


write_rds(sst_prediction, 'sst_prediction.rds')
write_rds(interaction_prediction, 'interaction_prediction.rds')
```

# Prediction

```{r}
local <- data.frame(
  sst = 22.0,
  sla = -0.15,
  oni_lag8 = 1.5,
  date = as.Date("2026-05-15")
)

exp(predict(mod_spatial, newdata = local, re.form=NA))


```

# Live Predictions

```{r}
forecast_date <- as.character(Sys.Date() - 1)


live_sst_raw <- griddap(
  datasetx = "jplMURSST41",
  time = c(forecast_date, forecast_date),
  latitude = c(18, 24),
  longitude = c(-110, -104),
  fields = "analysed_sst"
)

live_sst <- live_sst_raw$data %>%
  filter(!is.na(analysed_sst)) %>%
  mutate(
    date = as.Date(time),
    lat_grid = round((latitude - 0.125) / 0.25) * 0.25 + 0.125,
    lon_grid = round((longitude - 0.125) / 0.25) * 0.25 + 0.125
  ) %>%
  group_by(date, lat_grid, lon_grid) %>%
  summarize(sst = mean(analysed_sst, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(
    pixel_id = as.factor(paste(lat_grid, lon_grid, sep = "_")),
  ) %>%
  select(date, latitude = lat_grid, longitude = lon_grid, pixel_id, sst)


live_sla_raw <- griddap(
  datasetx = "noaacwBLENDEDsshDaily",
  url = "https://coastwatch.noaa.gov/erddap/",
  time = c(forecast_date, forecast_date),
  latitude = c(18, 24),
  longitude = c(-110, -104),
  fields = "sla"
)

live_sla <- live_sla_raw$data %>%
  filter(!is.na(sla)) %>%
  mutate(
    date = as.Date(time),
    pixel_id = as.factor(paste(round(latitude, 3), round(longitude, 3), sep = "_"))
  ) %>%
  select(date, latitude, longitude, pixel_id, sla)


live_forecast <- live_sst %>%
  inner_join(live_sla, by='pixel_id') %>%
  mutate(oni_lag8 = -0.4) %>%
  select(date = date.x, latitude = latitude.x, longitude = longitude.x, pixel_id, sst, sla, oni_lag8)

live_forecast$predicted_log_chlor <- predict(mod_spatial, newdata = live_forecast, allow.new.levels = TRUE)
live_forecast$chlorophyll_mg_m3 <- exp(live_forecast$predicted_log_chlor)
```

```{r}
geo_memory <- ranef(mod_spatial)$pixel_id %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("pixel_id_train") %>%
  rename(geo_baseline = `(Intercept)`) %>%
  separate(pixel_id_train, into = c("lat_train", "lon_train"), sep = "_", convert = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    lat_join = round(lat_train, 3),
    lon_join = round(lon_train, 3)
  )

grid_size <- 1/24
offset <- 1/48

live_sst_4km <- live_sst %>%
  mutate(
    lat_join = round(round((latitude - offset) / grid_size) * grid_size + offset, 3),
    lon_join = round(round((longitude - offset) / grid_size) * grid_size + offset, 3)
  ) %>%
  group_by(lat_join, lon_join) %>%
  summarize(sst = mean(sst, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

live_sla_4km <- live_sla %>%
  mutate(
    lat_join = round(round((latitude - offset) / grid_size) * grid_size + offset, 3),
    lon_join = round(round((longitude - offset) / grid_size) * grid_size + offset, 3)
  ) %>%
  group_by(lat_join, lon_join) %>%
  summarize(sla = mean(sla, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

live_forecast <- geo_memory %>%
  left_join(live_sst_4km, by = c("lat_join", "lon_join")) %>%
  left_join(live_sla_4km, by = c("lat_join", "lon_join")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(sst) & !is.na(sla)) %>%
  mutate(
    oni_lag8 = -0.4,
    date = as.Date(forecast_date) 
  )

live_forecast$physics_baseline <- predict(mod_spatial, newdata = live_forecast, re.form = NA)
live_forecast$chlorophyll_mg_m3 <- exp(live_forecast$physics_baseline + live_forecast$geo_baseline)
live_forecast
write.csv(live_forecast, 'live_forecast.csv')
```

# Daily Model

```{r}
clean_daily <- daily_master_dataset %>%
  filter(!is.na(chlor_a)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(sst_lag1)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(sst_lag2)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(sla_lag1)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(sla_lag2)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(oni_lag28)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(oni_lag56)) %>%
  mutate(pixel_id = as.factor(paste(latitude, longitude, sep = "_")))


daily_model <- lmer(
  formula = log(chlor_a) ~ poly(sst, 2, raw=T) * as.factor(month(date)) + sla * oni_lag56 + (1 | pixel_id), 
  data = clean_daily,
  control = lmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa") 
)

summary(daily_model)
r.squaredGLMM(daily_model)


full_daily_model <- lmer(
  formula = log(chlor_a) ~ poly(sst_lag1, 2, raw=T) + as.factor(month(date)) + sla_lag1 * oni_lag56 + (1 | pixel_id), 
  data = clean_daily,
  control = lmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa") 
)

summary(full_daily_model)
r.squaredGLMM(full_daily_model)

AIC(final_gam_model, mod_spatial)
BIC(final_gam_model, mod_spatial)
```

# Random Forest

```{r}
test_set1 <- test_set %>%
  filter(year(date) != 2014)
test_set2 <- test_set %>%
  filter(year(date) == 2014)

rf_data <- test_set1 %>%
  mutate(
    month = as.factor(month(date))
  ) %>%
  select(chlor_a, sst, sla, oni_lag8, eke, month) %>%
  filter(!is.na(chlor_a))
test_set2 <- test_set2 %>%
  mutate(
    month = as.factor(month(date))
  ) %>%
  select(chlor_a, sst, sla, oni_lag8, eke, month) %>%
  filter(!is.na(chlor_a))


rf_model <- ranger(
  formula = log(chlor_a) ~ ., 
  data = rf_data,
  num.trees = 500,
  mtry = 2,
  min.node.size = 50,
  importance = "permutation",
  seed = 42
)

print(rf_model)


test_predictions <- predict(rf_model, data = test_set2)
eval_data <- test_set2 %>%
  mutate(
    predicted_log = test_predictions$predictions,
    actual_log = log(chlor_a)
  ) %>%
  filter(is.finite(actual_log) & is.finite(predicted_log))

true_mse <- mean((eval_data$actual_log - eval_data$predicted_log)^2, na.rm = TRUE)
true_rmse <- sqrt(true_mse)

actual_mean <- mean(eval_data$actual_log, na.rm = TRUE)
ss_total <- sum((eval_data$actual_log - actual_mean)^2, na.rm = TRUE)
ss_residual <- sum((eval_data$actual_log - eval_data$predicted_log)^2, na.rm = TRUE)
true_r_squared <- 1 - (ss_residual / ss_total)


cat("Valid Observations: ", nrow(eval_data), "\n")
cat("RMSE (Log Scale): ", true_rmse, "\n")
cat("R-Squared: ", true_r_squared, "\n")



```

# GAM Model

```{r}
master2_mini <- master2 %>% 
  sample_frac(0.05) %>%
  mutate(
    month_num = as.numeric(lubridate::month(date)),
    pixel_id = as.factor(pixel_id)
  )

gam_model <- bam(
  log(chlor_a) ~ 
    s(sst_scaled, k = 10) + 
    s(sla_scaled, k = 10) + 
    s(oni_lag8, k = 10) +
    s(sst_tpi_scaled, k = 10) + 
    s(month_num, bs = "cc", k = 12) +
    ti(sst_scaled, sla_scaled) + 
    s(pixel_id, bs = "re"),
  data = master2_mini,
  method = "fREML", 
  discrete = TRUE, 
  trace = TRUE
)

summary(gam_model)


ggplot(eval_data, aes(x = actual_log, y = predicted_log)) +
  geom_hex(bins = 100) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(trans = "log10", name = "Density") +
  geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1, color = "red", linetype = "dashed", size = 1) +
  geom_smooth(method = "gam", color = "blue", size = 1) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Actual vs. Predicted Chlorophyll",
    subtitle = "Red line = Perfect Prediction. Blue line = Model Trend.",
    x = "Actual Chlorophyll (log mg/m³)",
    y = "Predicted Chlorophyll (log mg/m³)"
  )


bloom_threshold <- quantile(eval_data$actual_log, 0.90, na.rm = TRUE)

extreme_blooms <- eval_data %>%
  filter(actual_log >= bloom_threshold)

bloom_rmse <- sqrt(mean((extreme_blooms$actual_log - extreme_blooms$predicted_log)^2, na.rm = TRUE))

bloom_bias <- mean(extreme_blooms$predicted_log - extreme_blooms$actual_log, na.rm = TRUE)

cat("Threshold (Log Scale): ", bloom_threshold, "\n")
cat("Bloom RMSE:            ", bloom_rmse, "\n")
cat("Bloom Bias:            ", bloom_bias, "\n")
```

# Backtesting

```{r}
expected_oni <- -0.2
test_set <- master2 %>%
  filter(month(date) == 5) %>%
  filter(oni_lag8 >= (expected_oni - 0.3) & oni_lag8 <= (expected_oni + 0.3)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(chlor_a))


test_set$predicted_log <- predict(mod_spatial, newdata = test_set, allow.new.levels = TRUE)
test_set$predicted_chlor <- exp(test_set$predicted_log)

scenario_rmse <- rmse(test_set$chlor_a, test_set$predicted_chlor)
scenario_mae  <- mae(test_set$chlor_a, test_set$predicted_chlor)

cat("Performance in Expected May Conditions:\n")
cat("RMSE (Average error):", round(scenario_rmse, 3), "\n")
cat("MAE (Median absolute error):", round(scenario_mae, 3), "\n")

bias <- mean(test_set$predicted_chlor - test_set$chlor_a)
if(bias > 0) {
  cat("Bias: The model tends to OVER-predict chlorophyll in these conditions by", round(abs(bias), 3), "\n")
} else {
  cat("Bias: The model under-predicts chlorophyll in these conditions by", round(abs(bias), 3), "\n")
}

```

# Backtesting GAM Model

```{r}
expected_oni <- -0.2
test_set_gam <- master2 %>%
  filter(month(date) == 5) %>%
  filter(oni_lag8 >= (expected_oni - 0.3) & oni_lag8 <= (expected_oni + 0.3)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(chlor_a))


test_set_gam$predicted_log <- predict(updated_lmer, newdata = test_set, allow.new.levels = TRUE)
test_set_gam$predicted_chlor <- exp(test_set_gam$predicted_log)

scenario_rmse_gam <- rmse(test_set_gam$chlor_a, test_set_gam$predicted_chlor)
scenario_mae_gam  <- mae(test_set_gam$chlor_a, test_set_gam$predicted_chlor)

cat("Performance in Expected May Conditions:\n")
cat("RMSE (Average error in mg/m3):", round(scenario_rmse_gam, 3), "\n")
cat("MAE (Median absolute error in mg/m3):", round(scenario_mae_gam, 3), "\n")

bias2 <- mean(test_set_gam$predicted_chlor - test_set_gam$chlor_a)
if(bias2 > 0) {
  cat("Bias: The model tends to OVER-predict chlorophyll in these conditions by", round(abs(bias2), 3), "\n")
} else {
  cat("Bias: The model tends to UNDER-predict chlorophyll in these conditions by", round(abs(bias2), 3), "\n")
}

```

# Calculating Eddies

```{r}
master2 <- master2 %>%
  mutate(eke = 0.5 * (ugosa^2 + vgosa^2) * 10000)

pixel_eke <- test_set %>%
  group_by(latitude, longitude, pixel_id) %>%
  summarize(mean_eke = mean(eke, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

error_physics <- pixel_error_map %>%
  left_join(pixel_eke, by = c("latitude", "longitude", "pixel_id"))

cor(error_physics$pixel_bias, error_physics$mean_eke)

write.csv(error_physics, 'error_physics.csv')
```

# Master Eddies

```{r}
eddy_threshold <- quantile(master2$eke, 0.90, na.rm = TRUE)

eddy_composite <- master2 %>%
  mutate(
    water_state = case_when(
      eke >= eddy_threshold ~ "Inside Eddy / High Turbulence",
      eke < eddy_threshold ~ "Background Ocean"
    )
  ) %>%
  group_by(water_state, eddy_type) %>%
  summarize(
    mean_chlor = mean(chlor_a, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_chlor = median(chlor_a, na.rm = TRUE),
    observation_count = n()
  )

eddy_composite



master2 <- master2 %>%
  mutate(
    eddy_type = case_when(
      eke >= eddy_threshold & sla > 0.05  ~ "Anticyclonic (Downwelling)",
      eke >= eddy_threshold & sla < -0.05 ~ "Cyclonic (Upwelling)",
      eke >= eddy_threshold               ~ "Unclassified Eddy",
      TRUE                                ~ "Background Ocean"
    )
  )

table(test_set$eddy_type)


eddy_map_full <- master2 %>%
  filter(eddy_type %in% c("Cyclonic (Upwelling)", "Anticyclonic (Downwelling)")) %>%
  filter(oni_lag8 >= (expected_oni - 0.3) & oni_lag8 <= (expected_oni + 0.3)) %>%
  group_by(latitude, longitude, pixel_id) %>%
  summarize(
    cyclonic_days = sum(eddy_type == "Cyclonic (Upwelling)"),
    anticyclonic_days = sum(eddy_type == "Anticyclonic (Downwelling)"),
    # Positive = Mostly Cyclonic. Negative = Mostly Anticyclonic.
    net_eddy_score = cyclonic_days - anticyclonic_days,
    mean_eke = mean(eke, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_eke = max(eke, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_eddy_days = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```

```{r}
clean_plot_data <- master2 %>%
  filter(eddy_type != "Unclassified Eddy")


ggplot(clean_plot_data, aes(x = eddy_type, y = chlor_a, fill = eddy_type)) +
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, fill = "white", color = "black", outlier.shape = NA) +
  scale_y_log10(labels = scales::comma) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Anticyclonic (Downwelling)" = "red", 
                               "Background Ocean" = "grey", 
                               "Cyclonic (Upwelling)" = "blue")) +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Chlorophyll-a by Eddy State",
    x = "Oceanic State",
    y = "Chlorophyll-a (mg/m³) [Log10 Scale]",
    fill = "Oceanic State"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

```

# Supabase Upload
```{r}
set.seed(123)

ocean_df <- master2 %>%
  select(longitude, latitude, chlor_a, date, sst, sla, oni_lag8, month) %>%
  rename(oni = oni_lag8)
head(ocean_df)


con <- dbConnect(RPostgres::Postgres(),
                 dbname = "postgres",
                 host = "aws-1-us-east-1.pooler.supabase.com", 
                 port = 6543,
                 user = "postgres.yagqrtjjaecnvhozegka",
                 password = "SaidtheSky*028")
dbWriteTable(con, name = "ocean_data", value = ocean_df, overwrite = TRUE, row.names = FALSE)
dbDisconnect(con)
```
